free_badge: Free and Open Source for all
download_desc: A desktop application for Windows and macOS: asks a few technical questions and then automatically installs and configures token‑saving tools on your project. One‑click install, no complex technical knowledge required.
agents_section_title: Support for the best AI Coding Agents
agents_section_desc: The Token Saver infrastructure works with all AI‑based programming tools that run in terminals or editors.
og_title: Token Saver — Lightweight infrastructure for AI Coding Agents
og_description: Fewer tokens, cleaner context, controllable costs.
impact_item1: Select your project to detect Stack and commands
impact_item2: Answer a few short technical questions
impact_item3: One‑click install and config, less tokens, lower cost
problem_card1_desc: Extra logs and unnecessary information are sent to the model and fill the context.
problem_card2_desc: Identical files are read again each session increasing token cost.
problem_card3_desc: Agents forget previous decisions between sessions requiring restart.
problem_card4_desc: Prompt caching is not used properly.
problem_card5_desc: Real token consumption and ROI are not transparent.
cta_section_title: Ready to optimize your AI costs?
cta_section_desc: Send us a message on Telegram right now to register your Audit request.
